name: Principalities Temporal Identity
work_cycles: Nine-day week cadence including market-heavy Freedai and reflective Res’tdai
Year-end Ujra pause redirects civic attention toward renewal, feasting, and storytelling
legal_deadlines: Administrative processing slows or crowds around festival and Ujra observance bands
Civic halls expand staffing rather than erase observance pressure
shipping_windows: Guild and road traffic bunch near market turnover and post-observance reopening
weather_expectations: Moon and celestial observations shape expectations around festival intensity and route behavior
mourning_and_renewal_customs: House Panim-linked afterlife preparations and Felujitas-linked renewal observances intensify around year-end and life-cycle rites
public_language_about_time: People speak in week-turnover, observance bands, and month names like Apatite and Carnelian rather than purely abstract numbering
